lid._comment: High grip friction (overrides the real 0.5) + combine_mode 'max' so the lid's friction wins the gripper contact (the Franka finger pads are instanced, so a low object friction is dragged down by the finger material). close_grill has no gravity-assist (unlike close_box, whose lid falls shut once nudged), so the arm must GRIP the lid and swing it the full 60deg - a weak grip slips and the lid barely moves.
